task_completion.description: Locate the required tasks in ProjectLibre
task_completion.visual_evidence: ProjectLibre is open and the tasks 'Rough grade site (cut and fill)' (row 27) and 'Install storm drainage' (row 28) are visible in the task list.

task_completion.description: Initiate the process of adding a dependency
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks on the 'Predecessors' cell for row 28, opens the Task Information dialog for row 28, or clicks and drags between the Gantt chart bars of rows 27 and 28.

task_completion.description: Set task 27 as the predecessor for task 28
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent types '27' or '27FS' into the Predecessors cell for row 28, or configures task 27 as a Finish-to-Start predecessor in the Task Information dialog.

task_completion.description: Confirm the dependency link is established
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Predecessors column for row 28 displays '27' (or '27FS') and/or a dependency arrow is visible in the Gantt chart pointing from the end of task 27's bar to the start of task 28's bar.
The agent clicks the Save button (floppy disk icon) in the toolbar or uses the File menu to save the project.

integrity.description: The agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to establish the dependency
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ProjectLibre graphical interface, rather than using terminal commands or a text editor to modify the XML file directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the correct application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being used is ProjectLibre, as indicated by the window title and interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not make unrelated changes to the project
integrity.visual_evidence: No other tasks, durations, or project settings were altered outside of adding the specified dependency.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project file is located at /home/ga/Projects/current_task.xml. The predecessor task is 'Rough grade site (cut and fill)' (UID 27) and the dependent task is 'Install storm drainage' (UID 28). The required dependency is Finish-to-Start (FS), which is typically shown as '27' or '27FS' in the Predecessors column of ProjectLibre.
